finding_results.notes: Revised the Agnes-Carmen reveal scene (lines 155-225) to break up Agnes's polished mini-speeches. Two procedural derails from Carmen now interrupt Agnes before the invitation lands: (1) Carmen's clinical assessment reflex at line 159 ('Since when — is this a neurological change? I need to assess whether —') forces Agnes to clarify the stroke timeline through exchange rather than delivering it as a complete thesis; (2) Carmen's documentation-protocol retreat at line 177 ('I should be notifying the attending. A verbal status change — I'm supposed to document and call —') derails Agnes's reveal and forces a direct refusal. Agnes's buyer-screening role now emerges through Carmen's follow-up questions (line 189: 'What does that mean? What are you tracking?') and her alarmed recognition (line 193: 'You're screening people' / line 197: 'You keep written records. Of all of it. In the building.'). The complicity confrontation (lines 211-219) is now a stepped exchange with Carmen's self-defense and denial ('That's not the same as —' / 'I didn't accommodate anything') rather than Agnes's previous thesis-speech ('That is a real cost. I will not pretend it is not... What you have not done is looked at the work.'). Removed narrator-approval line ('She had made her case. She did not make cases twice.'). Agnes's LOW contraction level preserved throughout; Carmen's HIGH contraction level and trailing-off-under-pressure pattern maintained. All key facts (MMSE score, notebooks, hydroxychloroquine interaction, Carmen's complicity) still land. Notebook setup (agnes_notebooks) preserved with four notebooks mentioned and Agnes pointing toward the bed.

summary: Single finding addressed: broke up Agnes's composed mini-speeches in the Agnes-Carmen reveal scene by adding two procedural derails from Carmen (clinical assessment reflex at line 159, documentation-protocol retreat at line 177) and converting Agnes's thesis-speech turns into stepped exchanges where key facts emerge through Carmen's interruptions, follow-up questions, and self-corrections. Removed the 'That is a real cost' thesis paragraph and the 'What work?' / hydroxychloroquine briefing block, redistributing their information into shorter, pressure-driven exchanges. Contraction levels honor style bible (Agnes LOW, Carmen HIGH). No structural, continuity, or setup changes. Heading contract preserved.
